name: air-drow
description: AIR-DROW Settings + Kurdish Responsive Polish — focused Settings navigation, persistent local preferences, readable Sorani mobile typography and preference-only reset clarity.

scripts.verify:source: npm run icons:sync && npm run icons:verify && npm run icons:local:verify && npm run preflight && npm run check && npm run model:verify && npm run release:verify && npm run production:verify && npm run localization:verify && npm run runtime:verify && npm run qa:reality && npm run qa:critical-input-export && npm run qa:release-readiness && npm run qa:launch-validation && npm run qa:visual-guidance && npm run qa:export-preview-save && npm run qa:legacy-webkit && npm run qa:layout-legacy-runtime-hardening && npm run qa:hand-input-reliability && npm run qa:settings-kurdish-polish && npm test
scripts.verify:deploy-output: npm run hand-loader:verify && npm run deploy-build:verify
scripts.build: npm run verify:source && npm run build:static && npm run verify:deploy-output
scripts.vercel:build: npm run model:verify && npm run build
scripts.test: node tests/export-gesture-reliability.test.mjs && node tests/mobile-safety.test.mjs && node tests/release-readiness.test.mjs && node tests/launch-validation.test.mjs && node tests/visual-guidance.test.mjs && node tests/export-preview-save.test.mjs && node tests/legacy-webkit-compatibility.test.mjs && node tests/layout-legacy-runtime-hardening.test.mjs && node tests/hand-input-reliability.test.mjs && node tests/settings-kurdish-polish.test.mjs
scripts.qa:critical-input-export: npm run qa:input-export-safety && npm run qa:mobile-final
